bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle for the assembled art and place Rapier2D colliders or child transforms on each deck and the center pivot.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_scale_assembly_512x96.png through AssetServer during puzzle room spawn and attach deck anchor children at authored guide marks.
runtime_notes: The center pivot must remain visually aligned with the gameplay torque origin.
Keep deck tops horizontal in the source art so runtime rotation communicates tilt instead of pre-baked skew.
Reserve small marker pockets above and below the pivot for the dynamic balance text overlay.

context.usage: Primary seesaw puzzle assembly that combines the left deck, right deck, central axle, and target-angle ornament into one reusable world object.

shape.silhouette: A long dual-deck art-deco scale with two 240 px plates, a tall central axle, chain braces, and engraved target-angle ticks.

acceptance_criteria: Each deck top reads as a clean 240 px platform with the pivot centered between them.
Target-angle markings remain legible at gameplay scale without overpowering the silhouette of carried objects.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds puzzle rules, object dimensions, HUD placement, and the Bevy 0.14 technical targets for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art-deco tower mood, silhouette layering, amber beam contrast, and architectural ornament rhythm.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra silhouette proportions, eye-glow placement, and cloak-like shadow contours for player and echo scale checks.
